title: duroia eriopila var. eriopila
intro: Duroia eriopila var. eriopila is a plant species, also known as "Monkey Brush," a type of tropical shrub or small tree native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Duroia eriopila var. eriopila include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as potential treatment for certain types of malaria. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared through various methods, including drying, crushing, and infusing the leaves in hot water to create teas or infusions.
